=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/lazyEffect.ts(9,14): warning TS377091: Exported declaration 'lazyEffect' returns a lazy Effect. Effect is already lazy, so wrapping it in a zero-argument function adds unnecessary indirection. effect(lazyEffect)

/.src/lazyEffect.ts(18,14): warning TS377091: Exported declaration 'lazyAnnotated' returns a lazy Effect. Effect is already lazy, so wrapping it in a zero-argument function adds unnecessary indirection. effect(lazyEffect)
/.src/lazyEffect.ts(54,3): warning TS377091: Interface 'RepoShape' member 'load' returns a lazy Effect. Effect is already lazy, so wrapping it in a zero-argument function adds unnecessary indirection. effect(lazyEffect)
/.src/lazyEffect.ts(57,3): warning TS377091: Interface 'RepoShape' member 'watch' returns a lazy Stream. Stream is already lazy, so wrapping it in a zero-argument function adds unnecessary indirection. effect(lazyEffect)

/.src/lazyEffect.ts(74,14): warning TS377091: Service 'Repo' member 'watch' returns a lazy Stream. Stream is already lazy, so wrapping it in a zero-argument function adds unnecessary indirection. effect(lazyEffect)


==== /.src/lazyEffect.ts (10 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics lazyEffect:warning
    import { Context, Effect, Layer, Stream } from "effect"
    
    declare const effectValue: Effect.Effect<void>
    declare const streamValue: Stream.Stream<number>
    declare const layerValue: Layer.Layer<string>
    
    // Should trigger: exported zero-arg lazy Effect
    export const lazyEffect = () => effectValue
                 ~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377091: Exported declaration 'lazyEffect' returns a lazy Effect. Effect is already lazy, so wrapping it in a zero-argument function adds unnecessary indirection. effect(lazyEffect)
    
    // Should trigger: exported zero-arg lazy Stream
    export const lazyStream = () => streamValue
                 ~~~~~~~~~~

    // Should trigger: exported zero-arg lazy Layer
    export const lazyLayer = () => layerValue
                 ~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377091: Exported declaration 'lazyLayer' returns a lazy Layer. Layer is already lazy, so wrapping it in a zero-argument function adds unnecessary indirection. effect(lazyEffect)
    
    // Should trigger: exported explicit zero-arg function type returning Effect
    export const lazyAnnotated: () => Effect.Effect<string> = () => Effect.succeed("ok")
                 ~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377091: Exported declaration 'lazyAnnotated' returns a lazy Effect. Effect is already lazy, so wrapping it in a zero-argument function adds unnecessary indirection. effect(lazyEffect)
    
    // Should not trigger: generic lazy functions may need to construct type-dependent Effects
    export const genericLazyEffect = <A>() => Effect.succeed(null as A)
    
    // Should not trigger: Effect values are already lazy
    export const directEffect = Effect.succeed(1)
    
    // Should not trigger: Stream values are already lazy
    export const directStream = Stream.succeed(1)
    
    // Should not trigger: one optional argument is allowed
    export const optionalArg = (_?: void) => effectValue
    
    // Should not trigger: rest arguments are allowed
    export const restArgs = (..._args: ReadonlyArray<unknown>) => effectValue
    
    // Should not trigger: required arguments are allowed
    export const withArg = (id: string) => Effect.succeed(id)
    
    // Should not trigger: non-exported declarations are out of scope
    const localLazy = () => effectValue
    
    // Should not trigger: overloaded functions are excluded
    export function overloaded(): Effect.Effect<void>
    export function overloaded(_input: string): Effect.Effect<void>
    export function overloaded(_input?: string) {
      return Effect.void
    }
    
    interface SharedShape {
      inherited: () => Effect.Effect<string>
    }
    
    export interface RepoShape extends SharedShape {
      // Should trigger: interface property returning a zero-arg lazy Effect
      load: () => Effect.Effect<string>
      ~~~~
!!! warning TS377091: Interface 'RepoShape' member 'load' returns a lazy Effect. Effect is already lazy, so wrapping it in a zero-argument function adds unnecessary indirection. effect(lazyEffect)

      watch(): Stream.Stream<number>
      ~~~~~
!!! warning TS377091: Interface 'RepoShape' member 'watch' returns a lazy Stream. Stream is already lazy, so wrapping it in a zero-argument function adds unnecessary indirection. effect(lazyEffect)

      live: () => Layer.Layer<string>
      ~~~~
!!! warning TS377091: Interface 'RepoShape' member 'live' returns a lazy Layer. Layer is already lazy, so wrapping it in a zero-argument function adds unnecessary indirection. effect(lazyEffect)

      genericLoad: <A>() => Effect.Effect<A>
    
      // Should not trigger: one optional argument is allowed
      maybeLoad(_?: void): Effect.Effect<string>
    
      // Should not trigger: rest arguments are allowed
      variadic(..._args: ReadonlyArray<string>): Effect.Effect<void>
    
      // Should not trigger: inherited members are out of scope for this interface declaration
    }
    
    export class Repo extends Context.Service<Repo>()("Repo", {
                 ~~~~
!!! warning TS377091: Service 'Repo' member 'live' returns a lazy Layer. Layer is already lazy, so wrapping it in a zero-argument function adds unnecessary indirection. effect(lazyEffect)
                 ~~~~
!!! warning TS377091: Service 'Repo' member 'load' returns a lazy Effect. Effect is already lazy, so wrapping it in a zero-argument function adds unnecessary indirection. effect(lazyEffect)
                 ~~~~
!!! warning TS377091: Service 'Repo' member 'watch' returns a lazy Stream. Stream is already lazy, so wrapping it in a zero-argument function adds unnecessary indirection. effect(lazyEffect)
      make: Effect.succeed({
        // Should trigger: service member returns a zero-arg lazy Effect
        load: () => Effect.succeed("value"),
    
        // Should trigger: service member returns a zero-arg lazy Stream
        watch: () => Stream.succeed(1),
    
        // Should trigger: service member returns a zero-arg lazy Layer
        live: () => layerValue,
    
        // Should not trigger: generic lazy functions may need to construct type-dependent Effects
        genericLoad: <A>() => Effect.succeed(null as A),
    
        // Should not trigger: direct Effect values are allowed
        program: Effect.void,
    
        // Should not trigger: one optional argument is allowed
        maybeLoad: (_?: void) => Effect.succeed("value"),
    
        // Should not trigger: rest arguments are allowed
        variadic: (..._args: ReadonlyArray<string>) => Effect.void,
    
        // Should not trigger: required arguments are allowed
        byId: (id: string) => Effect.succeed(id)
      })
    }) {}
    
    void localLazy
